instruction: Building a smiley face step by step (step 4 of 6). So far you've drawn: face, eye-left, eye-right. Add the next part: circle (cx=64, cy=64, r=2, fill #222) with id "nose".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <circle id="face" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="48" />
  <circle id="eye-left" fill="#222" cx="50" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="eye-right" fill="#222" cx="78" cy="54" r="4" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <circle id="face" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="48" />
  <circle id="eye-left" fill="#222" cx="50" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="eye-right" fill="#222" cx="78" cy="54" r="4" />
  <circle id="nose" fill="#222" cx="64" cy="64" r="2" />
</svg>
